title: QiEOS Genesis
content: The foundational architecture, intent, and ontology of QiOS, the Qi Operating System, and its neural core, GINA. This document establishes: - the origin point - the governing principles - the core components - the rule structure - the semantic brain - the long-term philosophy - the eos of the QiOS ecosystem It is the Day Zero document, the "QiEOS," the Big Bang.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: QiOS exists to solve a persistent human problem: **information chaos at scale**. Where conventional operating systems focus on storage and retrieval, QiOS introduces: - semantic understanding - rule-governed structure - self-healing behavior - AI-native workflows - dynamic knowledge graphs - context-aware routing - governance-driven consistency QiOS transforms your digital universe into a **governed, intelligent ecosystem**.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: QiOS is built on three foundational principles.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: Everything in QiOS is ruled by explicit laws: structure, naming, metadata, routing, and security. No randomness. No drift. Merged from: - governance - dark matter protection - rule-based organization

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: QiOS does not store files. It **understands** them. Merged from: - semantics - ingestion - metadata - RAG - intelligent routing This transforms QiOS into a true **cognitive system**.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: Manual sorting is obsolete. QiOS heals itself, normalizes itself, routes itself, and learns from corrections. Merged from: - automation - self-healing - realms - no manual intervention - lifelong memory **Trinity in one sentence:** Governed rules, semantic understanding, and self-healing automation form the DNA of QiOS.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: Meaning universes. A Realm answers **"who/what universe does this belong to?"** not "what file type is it." Realms are boundaries of context and ownership. "Realms are pre-allowed by registry and may be enabled/disabled without schema migration." Typical Realm roots: - **QiPersonal** (your private universe) - **QiBusiness** (QiAlly/Kiali operations) - **QiClients** (each client's universe) - **QiVault** (knowledge universe) - **QiPlayground** (Catchall Sandbox) - **QiResearch** (source material, references) - **QiTemp** - **Archives** (retired/cold universes) Realm examples: - A personal medical PDF belongs to **QiPersonal**. - A PunchPro contract belongs to **QiClients/punchpro**. - A QiOS spec belongs to **QiVault**.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: Files that are _not primarily knowledge text_ but still carry meaning. Assets are stored **inside Realms** because their context depends on ownership. Common asset types + extensions: - **Images:** `.png .jpg .jpeg .webp .gif .svg .heic` - **Video:** `.mp4 .mov .mkv .webm .avi` - **Audio:** `.mp3 .wav .m4a .ogg .flac` - **Design:** `.fig .psd .ai .sketch` - **Slides/Visual docs:** `.pptx .key .pdf` (when used as media/branding) - **Exports:** `.html .json .csv` (when they are rendered outputs, not canonical schemas) Asset placement examples: - Brand logo → `realms/qibusiness/assets/images/branding/` - Client before/after photos → `realms/qiclients/<slug>/assets/images/` - Sora ad video renders → `realms/qibusiness/assets/videos/ads/`

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: **GINA = Generative Intelligence Neural Archivist**. GINA performs: - ingestion - semantic extraction - chunking - embedding - context building - normalization - metadata injection - routing - dedupe - linter execution - feedback learning GINA is the **brain**, QiOS is the **body**, and the vector index is the **memory**.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: - **Realm decides ownership/context (Personal, Clients, Business, Vault).** - **Assets decide format (image, video, audio, design, export).** The linter routes by meaning first, format second.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: Everything in QiOS must obey: - Structure - Identity - Meaning - Metadata - Routing - Versioning - Governance - Memory - Learning Any violation triggers GINA's intervention.

title: QiEOS Genesis
content: QiOS is a **cognitive operating system**, not a file system. A platform for: - self-organization - automated context - intelligent retrieval - human augmentation - structured knowledge - lifelong memory **QiOS + GINA is the lifetime brain you never had but always needed.** This is Day Zero.
